nasb.text: This will be the punishment of Egypt, and the punishment of all the nations who do not go up to celebrate the Feast of Booths.

esv.text: This shall be the punishment to Egypt and the punishment to all the nations that do not go up to keep the Feast of Booths.

cnv.text: 這就是埃及的刑罰，也是所有不上來守住棚節的列國的懲罰。

ccb.text: 这将是埃及和不上来守住棚节的列国所得的惩罚。
